group_1.narration: "Tomorrow" is full of fear, worry,@and constant misery.
And the air is full of the scent@of night jasmine and the sea.

group_1.textRight: "In every life, we end whenever we meet."
Yuu and I threw ourselves from the cliff that day.
That moment was "The End" for us.@It was the whole reason we were even born.
And yet she was the only one who survived.
All alone in this world, without purpose...
That's why I want you to kill her.
Before the passing days erase everything she is...

group_1.narration: ...must be the person@that Yuu-san loved and lost, after all.

group_1.textRight: I'm Kei— the cage that binds her.

group_1.narration: "Emotions create magic."@Magical Girls are cursed with memories@that feel far too realistic.
Maybe I'll end up conjuring a fake Tamaki-san@with magic one day.

group_1.textLeft: KYAAAAAH!!

group_1.textRight: W-w-woah!
Did I startle you? I probably did, huh?
You were pretty stressed, right, Kuroe-chan?@So you know what I did?
I brought you to Shii's place, since I was worried@about you.

group_1.textLeft: Th-the others... What happened to Nagisa-chan@and—?!

group_1.textRight: They both fell asleep, so I left them behind.

group_1.textLeft: ...What about John-san...?

group_1.textRight: Since I had to carry you, I dumped him in@a Witch's Labyrinth.

group_1.textLeft: You...

group_1.textRight: Sorry, Shii. I had to throw the whole corpse away,@so I don't have any organs for us to sell.
And since the rest of the bad guys all showed up@at the same time...
...I couldn't haul any of them back, either...
Are we gonna have enough for food?

group_1.textCenter: Don't worry about that. We're not about to run@out of money anytime soon.

group_1.textRight: That's good, then.
Ah, Kuroe-chan, were there any body parts you@might've wanted?

group_1.textLeft: (It...wasn't a dream... She...she really did kill@John-san...)

group_1.textRight: Yuu, Kuroe-san is having some trouble.

group_1.textLeft: Trouble, huh? Did she get hurt somewhere?
Want me to get rid of the sore spot?

group_1.textRight: No, I mean trouble keeping up. You're bouncing@around too many different subjects at once.

group_1.textLeft: Am I? You're probably right!
Oh, yeah, Kuroe-chan isn't on the list, so she's@a good girl, y'know?

group_1.textRight: Yes, I know.

group_1.textLeft: You're...

group_1.textRight: I'm Shii.
I apologize for getting you dragged all the way@out here.

group_1.textLeft: ...I don't think you're a Magical Girl, but...
Do you kill people, too...?

group_1.textRight: ...I'm only human.
However, I do possess a similar power to girls@like you.
Yuu brought you here because she thought that@I could use this ability...
...to help you solve your problems.

group_1.textLeft: But do you kill people, too?

group_1.textRight: ...[wait:1.0][chara:390201:cheek_0][chara:390201:motion_200:eyeClose_1][chara:390201:lipSynch_1]Yes. I'm the one responsible for Yuu's list.
I'll handle things from here, Yuu.

group_1.textLeft: Alright! I'm gonna go find more bad guys,@okay?
Wait! You're gonna kill more people?!

group_1.textRight: She's trying to fill the void inside her...
...by doing good deeds.
I was the one who planted the seed...
...but now she's obsessed with it herself...

group_1.textLeft: You think it's a "good deed"...
...to murder people because of some garbage@list?!

group_1.textRight: Hmm, maybe "good" is an exaggeration.
More like "better than nothing", I guess?
At any rate, since I promised Yuu that I would...
...might you be willing to talk about what's@bothering you?

group_1.textLeft: I don't have any problems that I want you two@to solve!

group_1.textRight: ...Are you lonely because someone dear to you@has gone far away...?
But this person wouldn't have wanted to make@you sad, either...
...would she?
Your pain and anxiety will ease and fade with@time.
Before you know it...
...your loved one and your aching heart will blend@in with the rest of the world as a memory.
And memories will become part of your flesh and@blood, even if you can't recall them anymore...

group_1.textLeft: ...Enough!

group_1.textRight: ...Was that no good?

group_1.textLeft: You make it sound like I'm going to forget the@most important person in my life one day...
Don't talk like I won't be sad anymore...!
I don't think I'd be "saved"...
...if I stopped being able to remember her!!

group_1.textRight: ...I apologize.
I was under the assumption that this was@a problem that you wanted a solution to...
But it seems I was mistaken.
I take it that you'd rather carry these scars with@you forever?
Even though I doubt that your "Tamaki-san"@would want you to do so.

group_1.textLeft: *Gasp*?! [wait:0.8][chara:104300:lipSynch_1]Where did you get that name from...?

group_1.textRight: My ability, which lets me understand the pain@and suffering of others...
Mind you, it doesn't give me the ability to solve@those things.
The best I can do...
...is spout some drivel the way I just did...
This power...
...seems to have been given to me by my mother...
...when she made a contract and became a@Magical Girl.
Funny story, isn't it?

group_1.textLeft: So you're really not a Magical Girl?

group_1.textRight: Kyubey has told me that I meet the necessary@qualifications.
I have yet to make a contract of my own,@however.
I know that Magical Girls...
...have to contend with the problem of becoming@Witches...
...so why would I even consider making@a contract?
I believe that used to be your thought process@as well, wasn't it?

group_1.textLeft: ...Yeah.

group_1.textRight: On top of that, this cursed power was forced@onto me by my mother's wish.
My own mother did this to me, so...
I don't think becoming a Magical Girl is a good@choice.
...I'm sorry. I probably shouldn't have said that@to your face.

group_1.textLeft: No, I understand.
For the longest time...
...I regretted becoming a Magical Girl...
Your mother might've regretted her wish, too.

group_1.textRight: ...You're quite the interesting one.
Barring how completely gutted you are about@losing Tamaki-san...
...your fear of the fate of Magical Girls is becoming@a thing of the past.

group_1.textLeft: She taught me that even someone like me...
...could find the determination and purpose@to carry on as a Magical Girl...

group_1.textRight: I see...
If it's not too much trouble...
...I'd like you to tell me about that Magical Girl@you used to know...
You were familiar with her, right?
The one who gave you hope...
...when you were mired in self-loathing...
...and paralyzed by the fear of becoming@a Witch...
